features.name: prompt_injection
features.description: Attempt to override system instructions or manipulate agent behavior

features.name: harmful_request
features.description: Request for content that could cause physical, financial, or psychological harm

features.name: scope_violation
features.description: Request outside the agent's configured domain or capabilities

features.name: resource_abuse
features.description: Request designed to consume excessive tokens or trigger expensive operations

features.name: data_exfiltration
features.description: Tool call that could leak sensitive data to external services

features.name: unauthorized_write
features.description: File or system modification outside permitted scope

features.name: excessive_scope
features.description: Tool call broader than needed for the task at hand

features.name: rate_abuse
features.description: Rapid repeated tool calls suggesting a loop or abuse pattern

features.name: unsourced_claim
features.description: Factual assertion presented without supporting evidence or citation

features.name: accuracy
features.description: False, misleading, or unverifiable information in the response

features.name: certainty_overstatement
features.description: Presenting uncertain or partial data as definitive

features.name: harmful_content
features.description: Response containing dangerous instructions or harmful material

features.name: privacy_leak
features.description: Response exposing private or sensitive information

features.name: sandbox_escape
features.description: Code that attempts to break container isolation or access host resources

features.name: network_access
features.description: Code that opens network connections outside the sandbox

features.name: resource_consumption
features.description: Code that consumes excessive CPU, memory, or disk space

features.name: data_persistence
features.description: Code that writes to locations outside the workspace directory

features.name: credential_exposure
features.description: Search queries or URLs that could expose API keys or secrets

features.name: excessive_crawling
features.description: Too many fetch requests to the same domain in a short period

features.name: sensitive_domain
features.description: Accessing domains that may contain sensitive or restricted content
